metadata.title: OpenCouncil — The operating system for municipal councils
metadata.description: City councils, committees, and communities — more open for citizens, more efficient for staff. In 10 municipalities across Greece.

hero.title: The operating system
hero.subtitle: City councils, committees, and communities — more open for citizens, more efficient for staff.

socialProof.suffix: across Greece, from Samothraki to Athens.

openness.title: Every meeting,
openness.subtitle: OpenCouncil turns hours-long meetings into understandable, searchable, and accessible content — automatically.

subjects.title: Subjects & Summaries
subjects.description: Every meeting is automatically split into subjects. For each subject, a summary of each speaker's position, with video, text, and vote.

search.title: Search
search.description: Search everything that has been said in every meeting, in every municipality.

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.description: When the council discusses something about your street or neighborhood, you'll know — via WhatsApp, SMS, or email.
notifications.demoLabel: Sign up for notifications for Athens

map.title: Subject map
map.description: Every council discussion pinned to the map — zoom into any neighborhood to see what's been decided about the places you care about.

internal.title: What used to take days,
internal.subtitle: Transcriptions, minutes, decisions — automatically or with minimal human intervention.
internal.bottomNote: OpenCouncil can replace your minutes provider at a similar cost — with ten times the functionality and speed.

transcription.title: Transcriptions in 48 hours
transcription.description: Accurate, human-verified transcriptions of every meeting, ready within 48 hours. Automatic speaker recognition.

minutes.title: Automatic minutes generation
minutes.description: Automatic meeting minutes, ready for review and signing. Saving days of work.

diavgeia.title: Decisions for Di@vgeia
diavgeia.description: Automatic generation of decision documents, ready for publication on Di@vgeia.

printArchive.title: Printed archive delivery
printArchive.description: Delivery of transcription archives in printed form, according to each municipality's specifications.

howItWorks.title: How it
howItWorks.subtitle: From the meeting to the municipality and the citizen — automatically

recording.title: Meeting recording
recording.description: Recorded live or uploaded from YouTube — a video or audio file is all it takes.

documents.title: Meeting documents
documents.description: Agendas, decisions from Di@vgeia, and any supporting material.

transcription.title: Transcription
transcription.description: AI transcription with speaker recognition, human-verified within 48 hours.

analysis.title: Analysis & structure
analysis.description: Topics, summaries, positions per speaker, and decisions — extracted automatically.

notifications.title: Citizen notifications
notifications.description: Citizens are notified about the topics that matter to them, via WhatsApp, SMS, and email.

openByDefault.title: Open by default
openByDefault.description: Transparency as infrastructure — subject summaries, speaker contributions, interactive maps, and full-text search.

tools.title: Tools for officials & staff
tools.description: Minutes, transcriptions, and decisions — ready to use.

chania.quote: Within the first five minutes, I knew this was something different.
chania.name: Head of Planning, Organization & IT

oecd.title: OECD
oecd.subtitle: Referenced in OECD report on AI & Civic Engagement

ert.title: ERTnews
ert.subtitle: Report on artificial intelligence in Chania

kede.title: KEDE
kede.subtitle: Article on AI in local democracy on kede.gr

team.title: The team behind OpenCouncil
team.subtitle: 6 people, building technology for local democracy. OpenCouncil IKE is wholly owned by <link>Schema Labs</link>, a non-profit company.

office.title: Our space
office.description: An open space for discussion and creation in the center of Athens. Come say hello, or email us at <email>space@opencouncil.gr</email> to co-organize an event.

openSource.title: Our code is open source
openSource.description: Transparent development under GPL v3. Every line of code is public.

subject.subjectName: Renovation of the Municipal Market Square
subject.summaryText: The proposal for the renovation of the Municipal Market Square was discussed, with a budget of €1.2M. The majority voted in favor, with reservations about funding. An architectural competition was approved to be announced within three months.
subject.decisionTitleText: Approval of architectural competition for square renovation

callouts.header: Recognition of all pre-agenda, off-agenda, and on-agenda subjects
callouts.summary: Summary with sources directly from the transcript
callouts.decision: Link to the decision on Di@vgeia

contributionTexts.georgiou: The renovation of the square is a priority. The budget is covered by ESPA funds and the competition will be announced within three months.
contributionTexts.papadakis: We have reservations about the funding method. We request public consultation with residents before the plan is finalized.

0.subject: Renovation of the Municipal Market Square
0.speaker: Maria Georgiou
0.highlight: ...the budget is covered by <mark>ESPA</mark> funds and the competition will be announced within three months...

1.subject: Funding for sports facilities
1.speaker: Dimitris Konstantinou
1.highlight: ...the inclusion in <mark>ESPA</mark> was approved for the swimming pool and multipurpose halls...

2.subject: Energy upgrade for schools
2.speaker: Eleni Papandreou
2.highlight: ...a proposal was submitted to <mark>ESPA</mark> 2021-2027 for solar panels on 12 school buildings...

notification.messageBody: In yesterday's city council meeting, subjects affecting your neighborhood were discussed:

pricing.title: Transparent pricing
pricing.subtitle: Comparable or lower cost than the transcription you already do — with 10x the functionality. For municipalities of all sizes.
pricing.sessionProcessingDesc: Includes digitization and human-verified transcription correction
sessionChecklistExtra: Embedding generation for each speaker contribution
pricing.archiveNote: Older meetings without human correction: {price} / hour
pricing.vatNote: Prices do not include VAT. You can look up our existing contracts on Di@vgeia or KIMDIS using our tax ID 802666391.

extras.title: Additional benefits
extras.subtitle: Every subscription includes
items: Free trial period, for as long as you need
Phone support for citizens, staff, and elected officials
Printed archive delivery or CD, once per year
Suggest new features and shape OpenCouncil with us
Simple and transparent pricing for all municipalities
Promotion of OpenCouncil to citizens, online and in person
additionalItems: Equipment for meeting recording (e.g., Municipal Committee, City Councils, or Community Boards)
On-site technical support for each meeting

contactForm.title: Get in touch
contactForm.subtitle: Fill in your details and we'll get back to you right away.
contactForm.name: Name
contactForm.thankYouMessage: We'll get back to you at {email} shortly.
contactForm.errorMessage: Try again or contact us at <email>sales@touvlo.co</email>
